Query
  Pipeline
    Stage where
      Binary ==
        Ident level
        String "ERROR"
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
          Alias n
    Stage union
      SubPipeline
        Pipeline
          From
            Source main
          Stage where
            Binary ==
              Ident level
              String "WARN"
          Stage stats
            Aggs
              Agg
                Call count
                Alias n
    Stage sort
      SortKey +
        Ident n
